entities.name: FRUIT AND VEGETABLES
entities.description: High-value species used to diversify diets and agricultural enterprises to combat malnutrition and poverty

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A global health condition that can be addressed by diversifying diets with fruit and vegetables

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic condition that agricultural diversification and development growth aim to alleviate

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SCIENCE
entities.description: The field of science that contributes to development prospects, health, and the growth of national economies

entities.name: APPLIED RESEARCH
entities.description: A relatively simple research approach used to introduce new crop species and technologies into development pathways

entities.name: UPSTREAM RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at protecting crop production from the effects of climatic uncertainty

entities.name: CLIMATIC UNCERTAINTY
entities.description: Environmental variability that threatens the production of fruit and vegetables

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of incorporating high-value species into agriculture to ensure food security and economic growth

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NATIONAL ECONOMIES
entities.description: The economic systems of nations whose growth and equity can be enhanced by agricultural science

relationships.description: acts as an engine of development growth to alleviate
